overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in western attire walking through a shallow forest stream. The scene features dense pine forests, rocky terrain, and a flowing stream under partly cloudy skies with diffused natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest stream bed with rocky banks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky edge of a shallow stream, navigating through pine forest terrain

entered.detail: shallow flowing stream running parallel to the path, reflecting the cloudy sky
tall evergreen trees towering above the stream valley
large moss-covered boulders scattered along the stream bank
decaying log lying across the forest floor near the water
uneven rocky ground with gravel and small stones along the stream edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a shallow forest stream, surrounded by dense pine trees and rocky terrain. The stream flows on the left while large boulders and fallen logs dot the landscape. The camera follows from behind in third-person perspective as the character navigates the narrow valley under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest stream opening to wider valley view

events.description: character slows walking pace and comes to a complete stop

agents.ego_description: slowing to a halt and standing still, looking out over the widening forest valley ahead

entered.detail: wider view of the forest valley opening up ahead with distant tree lines
hazy mountain peaks visible in the far distance beyond the forest

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches a more open section of the forest, the valley widens to reveal distant mountains and a broader view of the wilderness. The character slows and stops, standing still on the rocky stream bank while observing the expansive forest landscape ahead. The stream continues flowing through the center of the frame as the terrain opens up from the enclosed narrow path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, enclosed forest valley that gradually opens into an expansive wilderness vista. It begins by following a character from behind as they walk steadily along a shallow stream, flanked by dense pine trees, large boulders, and fallen logs. As the character advances, the tight confines of the rocky terrain begin to widen, shifting the perspective from a restricted path to a broader view of the surrounding landscape. The scene then expands to reveal distant mountains under a partly cloudy sky, leading the character to slow and eventually stop on the rocky bank. Finally, the camera settles as the character stands still, observing the vast forest landscape while the stream continues to flow through the center of the frame.
